horoscope: Today's transits are brilliant for strength of will and for enthusiastic or enterprising ideas, dear Aries. You can do a lot of analyzing, sorting, and making sense of the past today, nevertheless, especially with (or about) family. It's not the time to push for answers, but it's a great idea to do some gentle exploration. Ideas generated from conversations and reminiscing can be significant, and perhaps even defining! It's important to be mindful of what you're saying, but it's a fine day for releasing a problem through conversation with someone you trust. New light may be shed on a past matter from your childhood or related to home and family matters. In the coming weeks, you'll discover what this means for you. There can also be new ideas born out of old ones. Take notes! You are learning a lot today, from your own intuition and insight, and from those around you, perhaps indirectly.

New light can shine on matters related to communications today, dear Taurus, with the Sun and retrograde Mercury coming together today. You might rediscover a past interest or conclude that something you've been pursuing is no longer up your alley. Ideas occurring to you this week can spark a long-term project. This can be the beginning of new thinking about learning pursuits and projects, and you're likely to see recent decisions in a new light, particularly related to  learning, communications, siblings, and mental interests and projects. There can be helpful conversations today about the past or about previously tricky topics. Your advice to someone can be sought and appreciated. As rational as the day feels, you are fueled up to take action on a matter or to take on a new challenge as the day advances.

When it comes to money, business, valuables, talents, and personal possessions, pay special attention to ideas coming in today and this week, dear Gemini. Whether they're circling around you or coming from within, it's a time when ideas inspire you, leading to something significant down the road, and looking to the past for answers figures strongly. There is new, fertile energy with you for reviewing old problems and approaching them from a fresh perspective. Not everything will make sense, as is often the case with new beginnings, but what comes from today's conversations and thoughts can be important later. Financial and business thinking can be especially unique. This can be the start of a new direction, but for now, take notes rather than push forward. You could be focusing on recycling old ideas or discovering that a particular attitude or project no longer motivates you. There may be a breakthrough of sorts that inspires you. As the day advances, you're going in your own individual direction and deriving quite a bit of enjoyment or focus from it.

This can be a great day for reviewing recent decisions and ideas, dear Cancer. The observations you make now can lead to new ideas, improvements, or other developments that can be significant to you down the road. It's a time to take stock and think about changes you'd like to make. What you communicate today has more impact than usual with Mercury in your sign and conjunct the Sun, and with Mercury still retrograde, it's a good idea to keep things simple. People hear you but don't necessarily see the whole picture, so it's important to be clear and mindful. Good energy is with you as you draw on the past for ideas and recycle them in improved ways. Make room in your mind for positive thoughts and unique ideas. As the day advances, you're in good shape for energy, self-assertion, and the will to get things done.

You might enjoy a surprise memory or show of support today, dear Leo. There can be breakthrough actions occurring now. Ideas can come to you from dreams and impressions or from outside of you, but whatever their source, certain information you encounter today can be significant regarding letting go of bad attitudes or situations. There could be a secret revealed, a eureka moment, or you could otherwise be seeing old problems in a highly revealing new light. You're opening up your mind to new approaches that can be truly valuable. There can be small disappointments or unresolved problems from the past emerging for your attention, but it's best not to take others' views too personally. There could be a conversation about a personal matter, a secret revealed, or simply some extra thinking about the past. You are coming to a new understanding of a past matter through new information, or looking at something with new eyes. You're also quite assertive and action-oriented as the day advances.

Today tends to support efforts to establish yourself and take care of loose ends or unfinished business, dear Virgo. You can also be especially sensitive to what's going on around you and what's said today, with your ruler, Mercury, retrograde and in alignment with the Sun. What you communicate has a little more impact than usual, making it important to be mindful of how and what you're saying or writing. Others may be giving you important feedback or ideas come through what's shared in your networks, and they're significant. It's a powerful time to process, review, and rediscover old interests, decisions, and ideas. A friend from the past may reappear in your life, or you could come to a new understanding of an old friendship. Interactions today are encouraging and possibly quite fruitful, although you won't have all the answers just yet. Ideally, a new understanding of an old problem will be reached.

You may come into the position to review recent business projects, decisions, or ideas, dear Libra. Thoughts about your life direction and long-term goals are fresh, even if you're looking at the same old problems or concerns. You might arrive at a significant conclusion about your next move, or about certain directions your life is taking. Your communications have an impact now, so it's best to be selective with your words. While this is not yet the time for making sweeping decisions, your observations today can be invaluable later. There can be some fantastic moments of inspiration. As the day advances, a Sun-Mars connection is strengthening and animating at once! You're easily asserting yourself and getting ahead.

Today can be an important idea day for you, dear Scorpio, even if your ideas are currently in a raw state. Thoughts might turn to the past, or recent decisions and plans, and you're looking at things in a whole new light. The conversations you engage in now can be inspiring, especially interesting, and possibly quite enlightening. Buckling down in one area can release you in another. The things you read and hear about today can be helpful for future projects. This can be a time of drawing upon past experience and creating something new from it. It can also be a time for straightening out problems in close relationships related to confusing power dynamics, possessiveness, or ownership matters. You're not as content with imbalanced issues of give-and-take, and you'll be seeking to iron everything out.

You're in a strong position to delve into your own psychology, intimate thoughts, and feelings, dear Sagittarius, especially through a review of recent events. Conversations about intimate or taboo matters can be helpful and particularly creative. There can be important conclusions, clues gained, or satisfying investigations now. New insight into an old relationship or your own psyche can be helpful and enlightening. Make time to chat with a colleague or special friend, as you might learn something to your benefit. With the Sun and Mars coming together in a parallel aspect as the day advances, you may feel stronger and sharper, particularly if you take action on a matter. It's a time for making yourself proud, and the bonus is that others are likely to appreciate you as you do.

You may decide to partner up to accomplish something substantial today, dear Capricorn. While sometimes adding someone else to the equation can slow you down, today is good for sharing your load. You can experience moments of illumination, especially related to a close relationship. You might look at something from the past in a new way, which helps free you up as you go forward. It's not likely that you have all the facts or answers right now, but this is a time for some serious rethinking of matters. Counseling and advice can be in focus and helpful. Insights happening now can change your attitude or direction. You might revisit old conversations and remember things you overlooked in the past.

You could be bonding with someone over your ideas or pet causes now, dear Aquarius. Today's energies are also strong for looking at old problems in new ways, which can be helpful. You might gain important insight into a work or health issue as the Sun and retrograde Mercury align in your solar sixth house. Ideas coming to you this week can be significant down the road, helping you fix problems and make meaningful improvements. It's a turning point of sorts, moving you from a state of indecision to increasing clarity. You could be heading toward a better approach to healing yourself or taking care of your daily affairs. It's better to think about what you can do to improve and tweak current projects and ideas than for starting all-new ones, but your thinking in this regard is sharp.

Doing something enterprising and different can be energizing today, dear Pisces, but it's also a strong day on a mental level. There can be fun developments or progress related to creative play and expression. Conversations and ideas can be the start of brand new thinking along romantic or creative lines. There could be a reconnection or news that gets you thinking or seeing a past relationship in a new way. Different methods or solutions can come to light through a review of the past, which can be very important in the months to come. Today's conversations can serve as significant turning points. Coming to a new perspective on the past can help you start fresh.
